Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_0407_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}How was your first day at school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_0407_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}I see. Well, don't hesitate to ask your classmates for help if you need it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, apologies. I didn't mean to keep you here. You've had a long day, so get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_0407_RE_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}It may be overwhelming at the beginning, but you'll get used to everything in due time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But for now, you should go back to your room and rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_040
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4017 0 0}You're pretty late. I don't mean to be overbearing, but please don't make this a regular occurrence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, in any case, you look quite tired. Why don't you go to bed early tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_HELP_0417
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1019 0 0}Oh, welcome back! I gotta say, I'm so relieved now that you're out of the hospital.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't push yourself, though. Do you want to get some rest? Don't worry, your room's safe now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_HELP_0422
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, regarding the Dark Hour...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This may go without saying, but it is impossible to do business at any stores during that time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So make sure you're ready in advance. You don't want to be caught unprepared when it's too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0423_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh yeah, so you're buddies with Tomochika now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}He was sayin' you're "someone to watch out for." Oh, but in a good way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0423_RE1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2133 0 0}Haha! I can see why you two get along.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}He's kind of a ladies' man, but he's a good dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0423_RE2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2032 0 0}I mean, we're not super close or anything, but we've known each other for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}He's kind of a ladies' man, but he's a good dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0423_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2067 0 0}Oh, I almost forgot, I was gonna ask if you wanna go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It looks like there's more of those "Lost," so we gotta take out more Shadows, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0424_1_JOIN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, by the way, I saw you at the practice field earlier.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Miyamoto-kun from our class is also on the track team, right? Maybe you guys will be friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0424_1_NON_JO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, just FYI, if any clubs seem interesting, be sure to join before they stop taking new members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know joining something new can be tough, but it'll be fun, and you might make new friends![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0424
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, speaking of extracurriculars... Is it okay if we go to Tartarus tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't have practice today, so I thought it might be good to get a little exercise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm glad that you're taking initiative, but don't take it lightly. Remember, it's dangerous there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0424_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, speaking of extracurriculars... Do you wanna go to Tartarus tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't have practice today, so I thought it might be good to get a little exercise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_0424
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm glad that you're taking initiative, but don't take it too casually and let your guard down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_OK_0424_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I've actually been thinking about getting involved in more things besides just archery, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, wait, I guess I'm already doing that, huh? Not exactly what I meant, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0425
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are you getting enough training in? I don't want the team going downhill while I recover.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're the only ones who can fight right now, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_0425
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems like you've been doing a good job exploring Tartarus, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd still recommend trying to get even stronger, while you can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}You never know when another big one might show up, like before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_OK_0425
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems like you've been doing a good job exploring Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just remember, you're the only ones who'd be able to do anything if something happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Until I finish recovering, I'll be counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0427
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, right, I heard you might be joining the student council?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kirijo-senpai, you sure you wanna let a slacker like this guy join?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not forcing him. But if you're concerned about his work ethic, would you rather join yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0427
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2035 0 0}Oh, uhhhh... I'll pass. But thanks for the offer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0429
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh yeah, you can use that computer over there whenever you want, by the way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can put whatever software you want onto it, too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, but don't play online games on it. It'd suck if someone else accidentally used your account.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_GO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's been ten days since you first entered Tartarus, yet you haven't returned a single time since.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}What exactly are you thinking?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I told you it would be dangerous if you don't train adequately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps it was a mistake making you the leader... I hope you don't continue to disappoint me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll be going to Tartarus today, whether you like it or not. Got it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_GO_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4088 0 0}I don't want to hear any excuses. You should have had plenty of time to prepare by now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}I let you operate at your own convenience before, but clearly that was a mistake.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, we'll be doing what's best for everyone, not just you. So go get ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_INVITE_4F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is no one in the lounge...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone is probably already[n]waiting on the fourth floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
